# Assets

Drop project assets here that should ship with the repository but stay out of the mod jar (logos, banners, screenshots).

## logo.png

Place a 1000×1000 PNG named `logo.png` in this folder. The repository README references it at `.github/assets/logo.png` and renders it as the project header image.

For the in-game addon icon (`src/main/resources/assets/orekas/icon.png`), commit a separate, small (e.g. 64×64) version so the mod jar stays compact. Both files can come from the same source image.
